nodes.label: Tests for issue #1612: renamed root profile must resolve to ~/.hermes, not ~/.he
Legacy 'default' literal always resolves as root, regardless of cache state.
Empty/None name is NOT root — caller code decides what to do.
A profile name reported by list_profiles_api with is_default=True is treated as
Repeated calls don't re-invoke list_profiles_api — once-per-mutation memoization
Explicit invalidation forces re-query on next call.
If list_profiles_api raises, fall back to literal-default-only — never raise.
The core bug: a renamed root profile must resolve to _DEFAULT_HERMES_HOME,     n
Backward compat: a real named (non-default) profile still resolves to profiles/<
switch_profile()'s resolution branch: a renamed root must select     _DEFAULT_HE
switch_profile writes '' (empty marker) to active_profile file when     switchin
delete_profile_api on a renamed root must refuse, same as 'default'.
